name: FlowingMenu
description: A vertical full-height menu where each item reveals a horizontal marquee with text and images on hover. Uses edge detection to animate the marquee in from the closest edge (top or bottom).

items.type: { link: string; text: string; image: string }[]
items.description: Array of menu items. Each item has a link URL, display text, and background image URL for the marquee.

speed.description: Duration in seconds for the marquee to complete one full loop. Lower values = faster scrolling.

textColor.description: Color of the menu item text in the default (non-hovered) state.

bgColor.description: Background color of the entire menu container.

marqueeBgColor.description: Background color of the marquee overlay that appears on hover.

marqueeTextColor.description: Text color inside the marquee overlay.

borderColor.description: Color of the border between menu items.

examples.title: Basic Usage

aiPromptHint: FlowingMenu must be inside a container with explicit height (e.g. h-[600px] or h-screen). Each item in the items array needs link, text, and image properties. The component uses GSAP for animations. Import as default import.
